hero.headline: 29 Years Keeping Vegas Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Since 1997, Las Vegas homeowners have trusted our owner-operated team for worry-free weekly pool maintenance. Eco-friendly products, honest pricing, and a pool you can actually enjoy.

services.headline: Pool Services Built for the Desert
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to deep cleaning treatments, we handle every aspect of your pool care so you never have to.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Complete weekly care including pH balancing, chlorine treatment, skimmer cleaning, brushing, debris removal, and vacuuming your pool floor.

cards.title: Water Testing & Balancing
cards.description: Professional water chemistry analysis followed by precise application of eco-friendly, skin-safe products to restore perfect balance.

cards.title: Acid Wash Treatment
cards.description: Deep cleaning acid wash to remove stubborn stains, algae buildup, and mineral deposits — bringing your pool surface back to like-new condition.

cards.title: Shock Cycle Service
cards.description: Specialized super-chlorination and oxidation treatment for high-use pools, eliminating bacteria and viruses after heavy swim activity.

cards.title: Equipment Inspection
cards.description: Thorough pump, filter, and skimmer inspections to catch potential issues early — before they turn into expensive repairs.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Prep
cards.description: Get your pool ready for peak Vegas summer with a full equipment check, deep clean, and chemical optimization for heavy use months.

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll schedule a convenient time to assess your pool's needs — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Get a Custom Care Plan
steps.description: We'll test your water, inspect your equipment, and recommend the right service plan for your pool size and usage.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: We handle everything on a reliable weekly schedule. You just enjoy crystal clear water every time you step outside.

about.label: About Freezing Lakes Pool Service
about.headline: Owner-Operated Pool Care You Can Count On
about.description: Since 1997, Max Flores and the Freezing Lakes team have provided honest, reliable pool maintenance across the Las Vegas Valley. We believe in personal accountability — the owner is involved in every service visit. Our eco-friendly approach keeps your pool safe for your family while our nearly 30 years of experience means we've seen and solved every pool problem Vegas can throw at us.

features.title: Owner-Operated Service
features.description: Max personally oversees every account — you'll never deal with an anonymous technician or call center.

features.title: Eco-Friendly & Skin-Safe
features.description: We use only eco-friendly, skin-safe products so your family and pets can swim without worry.

features.title: Licensed & Insured
features.description: Fully licensed by the State of Nevada with nearly 30 years of proven pool care expertise.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pool Care Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Weekly maintenance plans starting at $110/month. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Just reliable service you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on honesty and integrity for 29 years — and we stand behind every job with the owner's personal guarantee.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced in Las Vegas?
faqs.answer: In the Las Vegas heat, weekly service is essential to maintain proper chemical balance and prevent algae growth. Our standard plans include once-per-week visits to keep your pool swim-ready year-round.

faqs.question: What's included in weekly maintenance?
faqs.answer: Every visit includes pH and chlorine balancing, skimmer and pump basket cleaning, brushing walls/steps/tiles, surface skimming, debris removal, vacuuming, and a full equipment check.

faqs.question: Do you use chemicals that are safe for kids and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use eco-friendly, skin-safe products that effectively sanitize your pool without harsh side effects. Your family and pets can swim with confidence.

faqs.question: What is a shock cycle and does my pool need one?
faqs.answer: A shock cycle is a super-chlorination treatment that eliminates bacteria and viruses. We recommend it for pools hosting 10+ swimmers per week or after pool parties to restore safe water quality.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide free, no-obligation estimates. We'll visit your property, assess your pool's condition, test the water, and recommend the right service plan for your needs and budget.

testimonials.name: Robert
testimonials.text: HONESTY, INTEGRITY, TRUST, RELIABLE!!! I have been a client for 2 years now. Max has proven to me that he is dependable and takes great care of my pool.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: I loved this company. My appointment was confirmed day before, they were on time and spent extra time on areas that were damaged from previous renters.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Fast, affordable and reliable. Joey is the only pool guy I will ever use. Very nice chap who was friendly and knowledgeable about the job.
